rulings.Case Title: 524 HOWARD LLC VS. REDWOOD MORTGAGE INVESTORS VIII, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 9, 2012, line 1 - DEFENDANT REDWOOD MORTGAGE INVESTORS VIII,, REDWOOD MORTGAGE CORP., MICHAEL BURWELL, LOREEN RANDICH's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens. Grant, Motion to expunge Lis Pendens pursuant to CCP 405.32 Plaintiff failed to sustain burden of prevailing on real property claim. =(501/REQ)
